# Project Instructions

1 modules · 1 capabilities · 0 entitlements. Uses **Oxus Framework** for dependency resolution and codegen.

## Modules

### minimal-ts-provider (v0.0.1)

Minimal TypeScript provider — one hello capability.

Provides: `hello`


## Conventions

- Import from `generated/entitlements` — never call capabilities directly
- Run `oxus build` after editing any `module.yaml`
- Per-module detail in `generated/SKILL.md`
